blocker_name: Required CSS/JS not loaded in current browser audit target/path mode
safe_fix_options: A. Use a safe local static server mode with no runtime side effects and verified asset serving.
B. Correct file:// base/path handling so CSS/JS resolve from V0.6 app directory.
C. Enforce runner gate: reject FPS acceptance unless required CSS/JS loaded successfully.
required_future_checks: Confirm required CSS loaded (HTTP/file status success).
Confirm required JS loaded (HTTP/file status success).
Re-run browser audit and verify failed_requests_required == 0.
Only then accept FPS for UI performance evidence.
next_gate_requirements: No runtime mutation while fixing audit target/path mode.
No raw trace commit by default.
No fake PASS when required assets are missing.
